source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 本周中国多领域解锁硬核成就
topics.official_english: China achieves multiple hardcore accomplishments across various fields this week
topics.why_hot: Highlights China's recent technological and scientific progress, generating national pride.
topics.share_angle: Summarize key achievements from the week, focusing on technology and science.

topics.chinese_topic: 男生考703分也烦恼：上北大还是清华
topics.official_english: Student scoring 703 in college entrance exam torn between Peking and Tsinghua
topics.why_hot: Relatable and aspirational story during college application season.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the pressure and privilege of top scorers in China's education system.

topics.chinese_topic: 母亲残疾父亲务农 河南女孩高考699分
topics.official_english: Henan girl from poor family scores 699 in college entrance exam
topics.why_hot: Inspirational story of overcoming adversity through education.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the role of education in social mobility and the challenges faced by rural students.

topics.chinese_topic: 浙大学生畅聊志愿填报并送祝福
topics.official_english: Zhejiang University students discuss college application and send blessings
topics.why_hot: Timely advice for high school graduates during application season.
topics.share_angle: Share tips from university students on choosing majors and adjusting to college life.

topics.chinese_topic: “变电站电磁辐射会致癌”不实
topics.official_english: Claim that substation electromagnetic radiation causes cancer is false
topics.why_hot: Addresses a common public health misconception, relevant to daily life.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science behind electromagnetic fields and why the claim is unfounded.

topics.official_english: Public complains about high telecom fees for a long time
topics.why_hot: Widespread consumer dissatisfaction with telecom pricing.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the debate over telecom fees in China and compare with international rates.

topics.chinese_topic: 网民公然侮辱张桂梅校长被行拘
topics.official_english: Netizen detained for publicly insulting principal Zhang Guimei
topics.why_hot: Involves a revered educator and sparks debate on online speech and respect.
topics.share_angle: Profile Zhang Guimei's contributions and discuss the legal consequences of online harassment.

topics.chinese_topic: 网友反馈戒烟后“长出头发”
topics.official_english: Netizens report hair regrowth after quitting smoking
topics.why_hot: Viral anecdote linking smoking cessation to hair growth, generating curiosity.
topics.share_angle: Explore the scientific plausibility and encourage healthy habits.
